rule_summary: When velocity is extreme, we size down first and only re-risk after normalization.
how_used: High percentile above 90th: reduce gross exposure by one risk bucket.
Falling back below threshold: restore base sizing in two steps.
If volatility stays extreme: no chasing, only defensive entries.
rule_summary_en: When velocity is extreme, we size down first and only re-risk after normalization.
rule_summary_zh: 当速度指标处于极端区间时，先降风险，再等待归一后逐步恢复仓位。
how_used_en: High percentile above 90th: reduce gross exposure by one risk bucket.
Falling back below threshold: restore base sizing in two steps.
If volatility stays extreme: no chasing, only defensive entries.
how_used_zh: 分位数超过 90%：总风险敞口下调一个风险桶。
指标回落至阈值下方：分两步恢复基础仓位。
若极端波动持续：只做防守型入场，不追涨杀跌。
